name: Lightspeed Automotive Dealer Management System API
what_it_does: Lightspeed Evo automotive and powersports dealer management system (DMS) REST API for motorcycle, powersports, boat, RV, and marine dealer operations management. Enables AI agents to manage vehicle and unit inventory creation and pricing for powersports dealer inventory automation, handle sales order and deal creation for vehicle purchase workflow automation, access parts and accessories inventory management for powersports parts fulfillment automation, retrieve service work order creation and labor management for dealer service department automation, manage customer account and purchase history for dealer CRM and repeat customer automation, handle manufacturer warranty claim submission for powersports warranty management automation, access accounting integration and cost-of-sale for dealer financial reporting automation, retrieve F&I product desking and finance reserve calculation for powersports deal automation, manage multi-location inventory and parts transfer for powersports dealer group automation, and integrate Lightspeed with powersports OEMs (Harley-Davidson, BRP, Honda, Yamaha, Polaris), parts suppliers, and F&I providers for end-to-end powersports dealer operations.
use_cases: Managing powersports inventory from dealer operations agents
Processing service work orders from service department agents
Submitting warranty claims from OEM warranty automation agents
Tracking parts from powersports fulfillment agents
not_for: Franchised automotive (car) dealer management (use CDK Drive or Reynolds & Reynolds)
best_when: A motorcycle, powersports, boat, RV, or marine dealer wanting AI agents to automate inventory management, service operations, parts ordering, warranty claims, and F&I workflow within Lightspeed Evo as the powersports DMS.
avoid_when: OEM WARRANTY SUBMISSION ACCURACY FOR CLAIM PAYMENT: Automated warranty claim submission via Lightspeed to powersports OEMs (Harley-Davidson, BRP, Polaris) must include correct failure codes, labor operation codes, and technician certification; automated warranty claims with incorrect OEM-specific codes create claim denial and technician certification suspension. FLOOR PLAN FINANCING UNIT AVAILABILITY FOR SALE: Automated vehicle sale processing via Lightspeed must verify unit is not restricted by floor plan finance curtailment or payoff hold; automated deal creation on floor-planned unit under financing restriction creates floor plan lender compliance violation. FFL DEALER COMPLIANCE FOR FIREARMS ACCESSORIES: If dealer sells firearms or accessories, automated order processing must apply FFL and 4473 Form requirements; automated accessory sale to prohibited purchaser without FFL compliance check creates ATF violation.

auth.notes: Lightspeed Evo uses OAuth and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Calgary, Alberta Canada HQ (acquired by CDK Global 2014, then sold to Volaris Group). Lightspeed Evo founded 1994. 4,000+ powersports, marine, RV dealer customers. Powersports DMS for Harley-Davidson, BRP, Honda, Yamaha, Polaris, Sea-Doo, Ski-Doo dealers. OEM interface certified. Parts and service, F&I desking, floor plan integration. Competes with DX1, Infinity DMS, and Motility for powersports dealer DMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per dealer location
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per dealer location; module pricing for multi-store and F&I add-ons; OEM interface fees
pricing.notes: Calgary AB Canada (Volaris Group). Annual subscription per dealer location. 4,000+ dealer customers. Powersports, marine, RV DMS. OEM interface certified.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; inventory and sales queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required for deal status

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — DEAL AND SERVICE STATUS REQUIRES POLLING: Lightspeed Evo does not support webhooks; automated deal completion, service work order status, and parts availability notifications require scheduled polling; implement polling aligned with dealer service and sales cadence

OEM WARRANTY CLAIM CODE VALIDATION PER MANUFACTURER: Automated warranty claim submission via Lightspeed must apply OEM-specific failure codes and labor operation codes (LOPs); each powersports OEM (Harley-Davidson, BRP, Honda, Polaris) has distinct warranty claim code set; automated claim submission without OEM-specific code validation creates claim denial

FLOOR PLAN CURTAILMENT UNIT AVAILABILITY: Automated vehicle sale processing must check floor plan financing status per unit VIN/serial number; floor-planned units with overdue curtailment or payoff hold are restricted from sale; automated deal creation without floor plan status check creates floor plan lender compliance issue

POWERSPORTS OEM INTERFACE CERTIFICATION PER MANUFACTURER: Lightspeed OEM interfaces (parts ordering, warranty, pricing) are certified per manufacturer; not all Lightspeed installations have all OEM interfaces activated; automated OEM integration workflows must verify activated OEM interface for dealer before building manufacturer-specific automation

CANADA vs US TAX CALCULATION: Lightspeed serves US and Canadian dealers; automated tax calculation must apply jurisdiction-correct tax rules (US sales tax vs Canadian GST/HST/PST); automated deal tax calculation using wrong jurisdiction rules creates incorrect tax collection and CRA or IRS exposure

PARTS SUPERSESSION CHAIN FOR OBSOLETE PART NUMBERS: Automated parts ordering via Lightspeed must follow OEM parts supersession chain for discontinued part numbers; automated order with obsolete part number without supersession resolution creates order fulfillment failure and technician service delay
agent_readiness.security_notes: Powersports DMS. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Dealer inventory, customer, and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Powersports dealer DMS. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Dealer inventory, customer, and transaction data.
